name: god-games
description: Reference-implementation consumer of @tns/game-engine. The achilles/icarus/orion/perseus games are the worked-example gallery surfaced inside Tell and Show's Game Studio.

scripts.sync-engine: rm -rf vendor/@tns/game-engine && mkdir -p vendor/@tns && cp -RL node_modules/@tns/game-engine vendor/@tns/game-engine
